quarantine.mr_name: Missing VN in HD rejected under shuffle_hd_subtags
quarantine.oracle: If a SAM header has an HD line but is missing the required VN tag, the parser must reject it. Shuffling the order of HD subtags does not introduce a VN tag, so the parser must also reject the transformed file.

evidence.quote: sam.py:66-75 shows HD VN is required and must come first

quarantine.mr_name: Invalid CIGAR zero-length ops rejected under canonicalize_cigar_match_operators
quarantine.oracle: If a SAM record has zero-length CIGAR operations (invalid per SAM spec), the parser must reject it. Canonicalizing match operators (= → M, X → M) does not remove zero-length operations, so the parser must also reject the transformed file.

evidence.quote: cigar_zero_length_op_removal exists as a transform to fix this, confirming zero-length ops are invalid

quarantine.mr_name: Invalid flag bit exclusivity rejected under normalize_seq_case
quarantine.oracle: If a SAM record has mutually exclusive flag bits set (e.g., both 0x4 unmapped and 0x2 properly paired), the parser must reject it. Normalizing the case of SEQ and QUAL fields does not alter flag bits, so the parser must also reject the transformed file.

evidence.quote: violate_flag_bit_exclusivity exists as a transform to introduce this invalidity

quarantine.mr_name: Invalid TLEN sign consistency rejected under permute_optional_tag_fields
quarantine.oracle: If paired-end SAM records have TLEN values with inconsistent signs (violating the paired-end TLEN convention), the parser must reject it. Permuting the order of optional tag fields does not alter TLEN values, so the parser must also reject the transformed file.

evidence.quote: violate_tlen_sign_consistency exists as a transform to introduce this invalidity

quarantine.oracle: If a SAM record references an RNAME that is not defined in any SQ header line, the parser must reject it. Reordering the header records does not add missing SQ definitions, so the parser must also reject the transformed file.

evidence.quote: sam.py:95-103 shows SQ lines define reference sequence targets

preconditions: RNAME is set and references an SQ record with known LN
POS + CIGAR reference span <= SQ LN
quarantine.oracle: After shifting POS by a delta within bounds, the alignment's coordinate semantics are preserved: the new POS equals old POS + delta, and all mate-pair coordinate relationships (RNAME, PNEXT, TLEN) remain consistent with the shift

evidence.quote: Coordinate indexing invariance: shifting all positions by a constant offset within SQ length bounds preserves alignment semantics

preconditions: SAM file is valid and parseable
quarantine.oracle: After SAM→BAM→SAM round-trip, all coordinate fields (RNAME, POS, MAPQ, CIGAR, RNEXT, PNEXT, TLEN) remain identical to the original

evidence.quote: Coordinate indexing invariance: format round-tripping preserves all coordinate fields

preconditions: SAM file is valid and parseable
quarantine.oracle: After SAM→CRAM→SAM round-trip, all coordinate fields (RNAME, POS, MAPQ, CIGAR, RNEXT, PNEXT, TLEN) remain identical to the original

evidence.quote: Coordinate indexing invariance: CRAM format round-tripping preserves all coordinate fields

preconditions: SAM file is valid and parseable
quarantine.oracle: After write-then-read round-trip through the SUT, all coordinate fields (RNAME, POS, MAPQ, CIGAR, RNEXT, PNEXT, TLEN) remain identical to the original

evidence.quote: Coordinate indexing invariance: SUT write round-trip preserves all coordinate fields

preconditions: RNEXT field is set to '=' or a valid RNAME
quarantine.oracle: After canonicalizing RNEXT '=' to the actual RNAME (or vice versa), all coordinate fields (POS, RNAME, PNEXT, TLEN) remain unchanged and the alignment semantics are preserved

evidence.quote: Coordinate indexing invariance: RNEXT alias canonicalization preserves coordinate fields and alignment semantics

quarantine.oracle: After normalizing unmapped record fields, coordinate fields (RNAME='*', POS=0, MAPQ=255) are set to standard unmapped values, and the record remains semantically equivalent

evidence.quote: Coordinate indexing invariance: unmapped records have standardized coordinate fields

preconditions: SAM header has SQ records with multiple subtags
quarantine.oracle: After shuffling SQ record subtags, all alignment record coordinate fields (RNAME, POS, RNEXT, PNEXT) remain unchanged, as SQ subtag order does not affect coordinate semantics

evidence.quote: Coordinate indexing invariance: SQ subtag shuffling does not affect alignment coordinate fields

quarantine.oracle: After removing zero-length CIGAR operations, the reference coordinate span (POS + CIGAR reference consumption) remains identical, and POS field is unchanged

evidence.quote: Coordinate indexing invariance: zero-length CIGAR operation removal preserves reference coordinate span
